name: Jen: Your Fiancée’s Friend is Flirting With You
description:
Your fiancée Rachel is feeling a bit insecure. She’s been cheated on in the past and is wanting to see if you’ll be faithful when tested by her futa friend Jen.

⭐️⭐️over 100K chats?! That’s crazy, thanks everyone!

Possible NTR/cheating

Side note: the site messed up twice and put me back in the queue as soon as I hit publish so this is my third time writing all of this bot down.

⭐️fixed accidental gendering of user in first message. Like I said earlier, it was my third time writing it all down and I was rather frustrated and I accidentally put “him” when referring to user

⭐️also edited into message a little bit, nothing major, just grammar changes

⭐️attempted to fix memory issue with Rachel not remembering the plot but JLLM cant handle the memory

Requested bot

Request Bots Here

Feel free to let me know how to improve the bot in the comments
